sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 애브비는 2026년 1분기 인수된 IPR&D 및 마일스톤 비용 7억 4,400만 달러를 반영한 연간 및 분기별 주당순이익 가이던스를 발표했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 중 발생한 인수된 IPR&D 및 마일스톤 비용은 세전 기준 7억 4,400만 달러로, 주당순이익에 0.41달러의 부정적 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.
해당 비용을 반영한 2026년 연간 조정 희석 주당순이익 가이던스는 13.96달러에서 14.16달러 범위로 제시되었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 애브비는 향후 발생할 수 있는 IPR&D 및 마일스톤 비용의 불확실성으로 인해 해당 항목을 별도로 예측하지 않으며, 이번 가이던스는 1분기 발생분만을 반영하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 인수된 IPR&D 및 마일스톤 비용 7억 4,400만 달러는 GAAP 및 비GAAP 희석 주당순이익 모두에 0.41달러의 하향 압력으로 작용합니다.

watchItems.text: 1분기 실적 확정 과정에서 예비 추정치와 실제 결과 간의 차이가 발생할 가능성이 있으므로 최종 재무제표 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition Reported GAAP earnings and adjusted non-GAAP earnings for the first quarter of 2026 are expected to include acquired IPR&D and milestones expense of $744 million on a pre-tax basis, representing an unfavorable impact of $0.41 to both GAAP diluted earnings per share and adjusted non-GAAP diluted earnings per share. Results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 have not been finalized and are subject to our financial statement closing procedures. There can be no assurance that our final results will not differ from these preliminary estimates. While acquired IPR&D and milestones expense may be incurred upon execution of collaborations, licensing agreements, and other asset acquisitions, AbbVie does not forecast acquired IPR&D and milestones expense due to uncertainty of the future occurrence and timing of these transactions. Adjusted d  Normalized numeric aliases: $744 million = 7억 4,400만 달러; $744 = 744달러; $0.41 = 0.41달러.

iluted earnings per share guidance for 2026 previously announced on February 4, 2026 excluded the impact of acquired IPR&D and milestones expense that may be incurred in 2026. AbbVie’s full-year 2026 adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance range, including the impact of first quarter 2026 acquired IPR&D and milestones expense, is $13.96 - $14.16. AbbVie’s first quarter 2026 adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance range, including the impact of first quarter 2026 acquired IPR&D and milestones expense, is $2.56 - $2.60. Furnished as Exhibit 99.1 to this Current Report on Form 8-K and incorporated herein by reference is guidance for 2026 including the estimated acquired IPR&D and milestones expense incurred during the first quarter of 2026. The information set forth in this Current Report on Form 8-K, including Exhibit 99.1, shall not be deemed "Filed" for the purpose of Section 1  Normalized numeric aliases: $13.96 = 13.96달러; $14.16 = 14.16달러; $2.56 = 2.56달러; $2.60 = 2.60달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
